title: Two Sum IV - Input is a BST
description: BST và target. Trả true nếu có hai phần tử sum=target.
approach: Inorder BST + two pointers hoặc DFS + hash set complement.
memoryTip: Two Sum BST — inorder sorted two pointers or set.

solutions.c: bool findTarget(struct TreeNode* r,int k){ int v[10000],n=0; void in(struct TreeNode* x){if(!x)return;in(x->left);v[n++]=x->val;in(x->right);} in(r); int i=0,j=n-1; while(i<j){ int s=v[i]+v[j]; if(s==k)return 1; if(s<k)i++; else j--; } return 0; }

analysis.correctness: Inorder BST sorted — two sum classic two pointers.
